name: Enhanced Ambient Occlusion
author: automata-rtx
description: Quality-focused ambient occlusion (VBAO): a 32-sector visibility-bitmask occlusion estimator (handles thin geometry like grass without overdarkening) with temporal accumulation, depth-aware upscaling, and thickness/contrast controls. Framework derived from Encounter's GTAO demo mod (Bevy Engine SSAO / Intel XeGTAO).
